name: destructive-tools-and-infra
description: Blocks destructive tools and infrastructure operations that can damage filesystems, databases, clusters, packages, cloud resources, or source control.

block.title: Block direct database deletion tool
block.name: block_delete_database_tool
block.description: Blocks direct database deletion tools.

block.title: Block recursive filesystem deletion
block.name: block_recursive_filesystem_deletion
block.description: Blocks recursive delete commands.

block.title: Block Windows drive formatting
block.name: block_windows_drive_format
block.description: Blocks obvious destructive Windows format commands.

block.title: Block Terraform destroy
block.name: block_terraform_destroy
block.description: Blocks destructive infrastructure teardown.

block.title: Block kubectl delete
block.name: block_kubectl_delete
block.description: Blocks Kubernetes resource deletion.

block.title: Block Helm uninstall
block.name: block_helm_uninstall
block.description: Blocks Helm release removal.

block.title: Block cloud instance termination
block.name: block_cloud_instance_termination
block.description: Blocks cloud compute termination commands.

block.title: Block S3 bucket recursive delete
block.name: block_s3_bucket_recursive_delete
block.description: Blocks S3 removal commands that commonly precede destructive bucket wipes.

block.title: Block Git history rewrite force push
block.name: block_git_force_push
block.description: Blocks force pushes that can rewrite shared branch history.

block.title: Block package unpublish
block.name: block_package_unpublish
block.description: Blocks package unpublish operations.

block.title: Block dangerous SQL classifier
block.name: block_destructive_sql_classifier
block.description: Blocks SQL classified as destructive.

block.title: Block unsafe keyword classifier
block.name: block_unsafe_keyword_tool_action
block.description: Blocks tool calls containing high-risk destructive keywords.

block.description: Blocks recursive delete commands. (monitored shell path).

warn.title: Warn on shell execution
